texto: Let us be honest: most of us rather like our cats to have a streak of wickedness. I should not feel quite easy in the company of any cat that walked around the house with a saintly expression.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Beverley Nichols: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. texto: A garden without cats, it will be generally agreed, can scarcely deserve to be called a garden at all...much of the magic of the heather beds would vanish if, as we bent over them, there was no chance that we might hear a faint rustle among the blossoms, and find ourselves staring into a pair of sleepy green eyes.

texto: It was not till I experimented with seeds plucked straight from a growing plant that I had my first success...the first thrill of creation...the first taste of blood. This, surely, must be akin to the pride of paternity...indeed, many soured bachelors would wager that it must be almost as wonderful to see the first tiny crinkled leaves of one's first plant as to see the tiny crinkled face of one's first child.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Beverley Nichols sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. A afirmação “It was not till I experimented with seeds plucked straight from a growing plant that I had my fir…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a familia, children, fatherhood, útil em momentos de fatherhood e gardening.

texto: You cannot have too many aconites. They cost, as I said before, about fifty shillings a thousand. A thousand will make a brave splash of colour, which lasts a month. If you can afford ten thousand, you are mad not to buy them. There are so many exciting places you can put them. . . in the hollow of a felled tree, by the border of a pond, in a circle round a statue, or immediately under your window, so that you can press your nose against the glass, when it is too cold to go out, and stare at them, and remember that spring is on its way.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Beverley Nichols sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “You cannot have too many aconites. They cost, as I said before, about fifty shillings a thousand.…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a coragem, cold-days, flowers, útil em momentos de flowers e garden.
